---
name: "🐛 Bug Report"
about: "Report a bug to help us improve the HALO Agency Platform"
title: "[BUG]: <short description of the issue>"
labels: ["bug"]
assignees: []
---

## 🐛 Bug Description
A clear and concise description of what the bug is. State if it is related to rendering, responsive layouts, or state machinery (e.g., interactive estimators, reset overlays).

## 🛰️ Steps to Reproduce
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. Scroll down to '...'
4. See error '...'

## 🔍 Expected Behavior
A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

## 📸 Mock-ups or Screenshots
If applicable, add screenshots, recordings, or mock-ups to help explain your problem.

## 💻 Environment Information
*   **Operating System**: [e.g., macOS Sequoia, Windows 11]
*   **Browser/Runtime**: [e.g., Chrome 124, Safari 17]
*   **Node.js version**: (Run `node -v`):
*   **Package Manager & Version**: (e.g., npm 10.2):

## 🛠️ Additional Context & Diagnostics Logs
Add any other context about the problem here, such as console logs or active security vulnerability scanner reports seen in the Admin Panel.
